name: better-formatter
description: "Format only ugly parts" – minimal formatter that respects your style. Fixes trailing spaces, compacts simple arrays, normalises blank lines. No AST rewrite.

better-formatter.compactArrays.markdownDescription:
Collapse simple multi-line arrays to a single line when they fit in 80 characters.

`[
  "a",
  "b"
]` → `["a", "b"]`

better-formatter.fixTrailingWhitespace.markdownDescription: Remove trailing whitespace from every line.

better-formatter.maxBlankLines.markdownDescription: Maximum consecutive blank lines allowed. Set to `0` to allow no blank lines, `1` for single blank lines, etc.

better-formatter.fixSameLineBraces.markdownDescription: Move `{` to the same line as the preceding `)` – turns `)\n{` into `) {`.

commands.title: Better Formatter: Fix Selection
commands.description: Format the current line/selection with minimal fixes (compact arrays, trailing spaces, …). Use after Prettier.
